title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core for read, write, edit, and bash operations, with extension support. It works with multiple models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, and offers npm and git-based extension installation alongside custom prompt templates.
